Name: EASTMAN Double Cylinder Air Compressor 12V 150 PSI Tyre Inflator Pump 60L Min Flow LED Light Battery Alligator Clamps SUVs Trucks Cars
Description: Double Piston Technology: Engineered with a dual-cylinder mechanism that generates superior power and airflow, making it ideal for inflating larger tires on SUVs and trucks quickly. High-Speed Inflation: Boasts a maximum displacement of 60 Ltr./Min, providing rapid air delivery to get you back on the road faster than standard inflators. 150 PSI High Pressure: Capable of reaching a maximum atmospheric pressure of 150 PSI, ensuring it can handle high-pressure requirements for various heavy-duty vehicles. Direct Battery Connection: Includes an Alligator Switch for use through the battery terminal, ensuring consistent power supply for emergency situations without blowing internal car fuses. Built-in LED Light: Features an integrated LED light designed for night vision usage, making it easy to inflate tires or inspect your vehicle in low-light conditions. › See more product details
